---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for the Babel Player
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: mta1124-1629472, Copilot

---

##  Requirement
A clear and concise description of the new functionality or improvement being requested.

##  User Story
As a (e.g., Language Learner), I want to (e.g., Hear different voices for different characters) so that I can (e.g., Better distinguish dialogue in complex movies).

##  Hardware & Architecture Impact
Describe how this feature interacts with the current Hardware Orchestrator.
- **Affected Pipeline:** (Transcription / Translation / TTS / UI)
- **Target Hardware:** (CPU / iGPU / dGPU / NPU / All)
- **New Dependency:** (Does this require a new ONNX model or NuGet package?)

##  Proposed Implementation
If you have a specific technical idea for the implementation (e.g., "Add a SpeakerId field to the SubtitleSegment record"), please describe it here.

##  Alternatives Considered
A brief description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered (e.g., "I tried using System TTS but the quality was too low").

##  Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
